title: [placeholder] podman images: "failed to kill PID"
body:
Weird one. I've only seen it once (rawhide, rootless, podman-3.3.0-0.20.dev.git599b7d7.fc35) and have not been able to reproduce:
```
podman corrupt images - system reset test
     (from function `is' in file /usr/share/podman/test/system/helpers.bash, line 456,
    from function `_corrupt_image_test' in file /usr/share/podman/test/system/330-corrupt-images.bats, line 84,
    in test file /usr/share/podman/test/system/330-corrupt-images.bats, line 120)
     `_corrupt_image_test "system reset -f"' failed with status 125
   umount: /tmp/podman_corrupt_test.z4I9ih/root/overlay: No such file or directory
   $ podman load -i /tmp/podman_corrupt_test.z4I9ih/img.tar
   Getting image source signatures
   Copying blob sha256:03901b4a2ea88eeaad62dbe59b072b28b6efa00491962b8741081c5df50c65e0
   Copying config sha256:961769676411f082461f9ef46626dd7a2d1e2b2a38e6a44364bcbecf51e66dd4
   Writing manifest to image destination
   Storing signatures
   Loaded image(s): sha256:961769676411f082461f9ef46626dd7a2d1e2b2a38e6a44364bcbecf51e66dd4
   $ podman tag 961769676411f082461f9ef46626dd7a2d1e2b2a38e6a44364bcbecf51e66dd4 quay.io/libpod/alpine@sha256:634a8f35b5f16dcf4aaa0822adc0b1964bb786fca12f6831de8ddc45e5986a00
   removed '/tmp/podman_corrupt_test.z4I9ih/root/vfs-images/961769676411f082461f9ef46626dd7a2d1e2b2a38e6a44364bcbecf51e66dd4/manifest'
   $ podman images
   Error: error retrieving label for image "961769676411f082461f9ef46626dd7a2d1e2b2a38e6a44364bcbecf51e66dd4": you may need to remove the image to resolve the error: fallback error checking whether image is a manifest list: error locating item named "manifest" for image with ID "961769676411f082461f9ef46626dd7a2d1e2b2a38e6a44364bcbecf51e66dd4": file does not exist: error locating item named "manifest" for image with ID "961769676411f082461f9ef46626dd7a2d1e2b2a38e6a44364bcbecf51e66dd4": file does not exist
   [ rc=125 (expected) ]
   $ podman system reset -f
   time="2021-06-29T18:43:42-04:00" level=warning msg="error determining if an image is a parent: error locating item named \"manifest\" for image with ID \"961769676411f082461f9ef46626dd7a2d1e2b2a38e6a44364bcbecf51e66dd4\": file does not exist, ignoring the error"
   time="2021-06-29T18:43:42-04:00" level=warning msg="error determining parent of image: error locating item named \"manifest\" for image with ID \"961769676411f082461f9ef46626dd7a2d1e2b2a38e6a44364bcbecf51e66dd4\": file does not exist, ignoring the error"
   $ podman images -a --noheading
   time="2021-06-29T18:43:42-04:00" level=error msg="failed to kill 349134"
   #/vvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvvv
   #|     FAIL: podman images -a, after system reset -f, is empty
   #| expected: '[no output]'
   #|   actual: 'time="2021-06-29T18:43:42-04:00" level=error msg="failed to kill 349134"'
   #\^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
```
Filing as a placeholder for when we see it again. Maybe the error will look meaningful to someone.

comments.body:
Took a while (30m) but I got a reproducer:
```console
$ while :;do bats /usr/share/podman/test/system/*corrup*bats || break;done
...
   $ podman system reset -f
   time="2021-06-30T12:00:49-04:00" level=warning msg="error determining if an image is a parent: error locating item named \"sha256:961769676411f082461f9ef46626dd7a2d1e2b2a38e6a44364bcbecf51e66dd4\" for image with ID \"961769676411f082461f9ef46626dd7a2d1e2b2a38e6a44364bcbecf51e66dd4\": file does not exist, ignoring the error"
   time="2021-06-30T12:00:49-04:00" level=warning msg="error determining parent of image: error locating item named \"sha256:961769676411f082461f9ef46626dd7a2d1e2b2a38e6a44364bcbecf51e66dd4\" for image with ID \"961769676411f082461f9ef46626dd7a2d1e2b2a38e6a44364bcbecf51e66dd4\": file does not exist, ignoring the error"
   $ podman images -a --noheading
   time="2021-06-30T12:00:50-04:00" level=error msg="failed to kill 820620"
```
I have seen the same error message with `podman ps` on the first invocation after a reboot.

The error happens here https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/fd1715568b7c14451dcf2581c385c8d3e307d30e/pkg/rootless/rootless_linux.go#L271 or https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/fd1715568b7c14451dcf2581c385c8d3e307d30e/pkg/rootless/rootless_linux.go#L397
@giuseppe PTAL

opened a PR: https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/10837

In case the fix is not enough, the PR adds more information to the error message, so we can troubleshoot it more easily
